content:
# o8a вҖ” Autoevolutionary Agentic Fabric

**W8 Closed Alpha В· 142/142 conformance В· macOS arm64**

o8a (Гҳ8Г…) is a two-mode AI orchestration runtime with a sovereignty gate, a typed event bus, and a plugin substrate built on an octet phase discipline. It orchestrates Claude, Gemma, Llama, and local models across a dev-mode host daemon and a theory-mode isolated VM.

> **Status:** Closed Alpha. Invite-only. If you're reading this, you've been invited.

---

## What It Does

- **Routes AI requests** across providers with automatic fallback and fitness scoring
- **Enforces content sovereignty** вҖ” certain content classes route to Claude-family only, enforced at the transport layer
- **Runs a typed event bus** (ZdEvent) for agent-to-agent and agent-to-terminal communication
- **Hosts embryons** вҖ” atomic plugin units that extend the fabric with new capabilities
- **Separates concerns** between dev-mode (open routing, port 8818) and theory-mode (sovereign, Lima VM, port 8819)

---

## Quick Start

Requires: macOS 14+, arm64, Homebrew, Python 3.12+, Rust (rustup), Lima.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/subtillioN/o8a-core.git
cd o8a-core
./o8a-install.sh
```

The installer provisions the dev-mode daemon, Lima VM, and runs the full 142-test conformance gate. See [INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md) for the full 12-step breakdown.

**Verify:**
```bash
curl http://localhost:8818/fabric/state
# вҶ’ {"mode": "dev", "rings": 8, "status": "green"}
```

---

## Architecture

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  o8a-dev (host, :8818)        o8a-theory (VM, :8819) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  open provider routing        Claude-family only      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  aaf-daemon (Rust/Axum)       sovereignty enforced    в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                в”Ӯ                         в”Ӯ
          ZdEvent bus              Sovereignty Gate
          (typed SSE)              (3-layer enforcement)
                в”Ӯ                         в”Ӯ
    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ              в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ
  Embryons   Cascade    TermГ…       Оә-gate (Phase G)
  (plugins)  (Python)  (terminal)   вүҘ98% accuracy req
```

**Langscade tiers:**
- `T1бөҰ` Rust вҖ” aaf-daemon, o8a-nuc, core runtime
- `T2` Python вҖ” cascade agents, portal compiler, training scripts
- `T3` Bash вҖ” install, CI, shadow lifecycle

---

## Ring Structure (W8 В· 142/142)

| Phase | Ring Coverage | Tests |
|-------|--------------|-------|
| A | Sovereignty gate, provider registry, ZdEvent router | 14 |
| B | Scaffolding, prompt engine, resilient client, fallback | 15 |
| C | ОЈRGГҳPool, StablePrefixBuilder, fabric bridge, fitness daemon | 30 |
| D | GPU broker, FitnessMatrixV2, VM spec | 18 |
| E | Conformance corpus, discipline bridge, IPC bridge | 18 |
| F | TermГ… chrome, launchd VM service, theory-promote | 19 |
| G | Оә-gate вҖ” sovereignty вүҘ98%, intent вүҘ97% | 15 |
| H | Observability вҖ” TermГ… headless render-loop round-trip | 13 |

---

## Key Paths

```
o8a-install.sh          вҖ” bootstrap (single command)
INSTALL.md              вҖ” detailed install guide
W7-CONFORMANCE.md       вҖ” full conformance report
tests/phase_{a-h}/      вҖ” ring test suites
scripts/portal/         вҖ” GitHub Pages portal compiler
docs/schemas/           вҖ” embryon JSON schema (v0.2)
docs/embryons/          вҖ” embryon stubs
.github/workflows/      вҖ” CI + Pages deploy
```

---

## Embryons

Embryons are atomic plugin units. Each is a JSON file conforming to `docs/schemas/o8a-embryon-v0.2.json`. They declare capabilities, command surface, and routing constraints.

```bash
# Query the dev-orient embryon (once o8a is running)
o8a dev orient "how does the ZdEvent bus work"
o8a dev orient "what is an embryon"
```

---

## Contributing

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md). Three pathways:

1. **Fix a ring test** вҖ” find a failing test in `tests/phase_*/`, fix root cause, verify gate passes
2. **Add a new embryon** вҖ” create a `docs/embryons/{name}.json` conforming to the v0.2 schema
3. **Propose a new
